docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00) SERVED JUL-16-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ALLAN, LINDA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FERNIE, DANA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ALLAN, LINDA PLAINTIFF IS ENTITLED ONLY TO THE $3,053.64 REFUND OF SECURITY DEPOSIT WHICH PLAINTIFF HAS ALREADY RECEIVED FROM DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY FERNIE, DANA AS TO DEFENDANT ALLAN, LINDA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-04-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-04-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-04-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO COSTS, IFP FILED BY PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-04-2015 - JUDGMENT.

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FERNIE, DANA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
